TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Niae' ucna ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 90 buwan, 284 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 266 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 90%, Tayan 1%, Paywan 0.5%, saySiyat 0.5%, Truku 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.7%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Niae' ucna hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Niae' ucna hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Niae' ucna hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Niae' ucna hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Niae' ucna hya' ga Tapangʉ. tay mkyahu' na Niae' ucna hya' ga Sinvi. tay 'zil na Niae' ucna hya' ga Saviki. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ atu aris~ɕan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ʦ~ʨou **%, tajan *%, pajwan *.*%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *.*%, truku *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa tapaŋ*. taj mkjaħuʔ na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕin*i. taj ʔzil na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕa*iki. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Niae' ucna ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 90 buwan, 284 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 266 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 90%, Tayan 1%, Paywan 0.5%, saySiyat 0.5%, Truku 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.7%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Niae' ucna hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Niae' ucna hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Niae' ucna hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Niae' ucna hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Niae' ucna hya' ga Tapangʉ. tay mkyahu' na Niae' ucna hya' ga Sinvi. tay 'zil na Niae' ucna hya' ga Saviki. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ atu aris~ɕan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ʦ~ʨou **%, tajan *%, pajwan *.*%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *.*%, truku *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa tapaŋ*. taj mkjaħuʔ na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕin*i. taj ʔzil na niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕa*iki. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
